name: essos-concierge
description: Essos AI Health Tourism Concierge — work trial MVP (Eve agent + Spectrum iMessage transport + Next.js admin dashboard)

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm -C eve-concierge install && pnpm --filter @essos/shared run build && convex dev --once && convex env set ESSOS_ALLOW_SEED 1 && pnpm seed:reset && pnpm seed:team
scripts.dev: tsx scripts/dev-preflight.ts && pnpm --filter @essos/shared run build && concurrently --names "convex,eve,web" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,green" "pnpm convex:dev" "pnpm eve:dev" "pnpm dashboard:dev"
scripts.dev:ui: tsx scripts/dev-preflight.ts && pnpm --filter @essos/shared run build && concurrently --names "convex,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "pnpm convex:dev" "pnpm dashboard:dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r run typecheck && pnpm -C eve-concierge run typecheck
